Found 97 matches
C:\Users\Admin\Desktop\Code\Active\landingpage\PLAN.md:
  Line 44:   `GITHUB_TOKEN` env (read-only PAT, `repo` scope for private). Auth header:

  Line 106: - **H10 — Secrets.** `GITHUB_TOKEN` is provisioned by Tristan in

  Line 134: | `compose.yml` | UPDATE | Add `GITHUB_TOKEN` secret mount + `OLLAMA_BASE_URL`/`OLLAMA_MODEL` env; network for Ollama (H9/H10) |

  Line 140: - [ ] **Step 2 — GitHub client (inline).** Add `github.py`-style functions inside `server.py`: `fetch_all_repos(token)` (paginated `/user/repos`), `fetch_recent_commits(token, owner, repo, branch)` (per repo, 5 commits, subject+body), `classify_recency(pushed_at)` (H4), and a module cache `_GH_CACHE` (dict + 600s TTL, stale-while-revalidate: serve stale on failure). Token read from `GITHUB_TOKEN` env; header `Authorization: token <token>`; `Accept: application/vnd.github+json`. Never log/echo token. Verify: with a test token (or a recorded mock via monkeypatch in a quick local script) that pagination + commit fetch + recency classification work; 401/403/URLError paths return graceful sentinels.

  Line 146: - [ ] **Step 8 — Smoke + compile + local verify.** `py_compile` all .py; run `server.py 3102` with `GITHUB_TOKEN` unset (banner path) and set (if a token available) — both must render without traceback; update `scripts/smoke.py` matrix per H12 and run green. Desktop has no GitHub token → Hub must show the "token not configured" banner + curated-only, not crash.

  Line 147: - [ ] **Step 9 — Compose + OPERATIONS update (H9/H10).** `compose.yml`: add `GITHUB_TOKEN` from secret mount (`/srv/secrets/landing-page/github_token:/run/secrets/github_token` or env from `.env`), add `OLLAMA_BASE_URL`/`OLLAMA_MODEL` env, and join the network Ollama lives on (H9). `OPERATIONS.md`: document token provisioning location, Ollama env, and the Hub feature. Verify: `docker compose config --quiet` passes.

  Line 154:   without `GITHUB_TOKEN`; Ollama path exercised with a real or stubbed instance.
